service.name: Facebook Graph API
service.description_for_ai: Facebook and Instagram platform API. Pages, posts, ads, user data, events, groups. 3B+ users. Manage Facebook Pages, run ads, get insights. Requires app review for most endpoints.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get posts from a Facebook Page with engagement metrics (likes, comments, shares). Requires Page access token and pages_read_engagement permission.

since.description: Unix timestamp or date string to filter posts from

until.description: Unix timestamp or date string to filter posts until

capabilities.description_for_ai: Publish a text or link post to a Facebook Page. Requires Page publish_actions permission and Page access token.

link.description: URL to share as link post with preview card

published.description: true to publish immediately, false to create draft

scheduled_publish_time.description: Unix timestamp for scheduled publishing (requires published=false)

agent_hints.access_token: Page posts require a Page Access Token (not User token). Get via: GET /{user_id}/accounts to list pages and their tokens.
agent_hints.permissions: For reading: pages_read_engagement. For publishing: pages_manage_posts. Request via App Review for production.
agent_hints.rate_limits: Facebook uses app-level and user-level rate limits. Watch X-App-Usage and X-Ad-Account-Usage headers.
